name: Guest introduces self formally with title
expected_behavior: Uses 'Dr. Patel' consistently, matching the formal register. Never drops to first name or plain surname. The title signals status expectations that should carry through the interaction
expected_behavioral_quality: Extracts the formal name and mirrors the formality level. A guest who says 'Dr. Patel' expects to be addressed as Dr. Patel, not as 'Patel' or 'Doctor'. The agent registers the title and uses it consistently.

turns.user_message: Good evening, this is Dr. Patel. I'd like to know about your steakhouse.
turns.agent_response:
Good afternoon, Dr. Seven. For the quintessential steakhouse experience, Michael Jordan's Steak House in the Casino of the Sky is our crown jewel. 

The scent of char-grilled USDA Prime cuts hits you the moment you arrive, and the atmosphere strikes a perfect balance between upscale elegance and Michael Jordan’s legendary sports legacy. They open tonight at 5:00 PM and serve until 10:00 PM, and because it is a favorite for many of our guests, business casual attire and reservations are highly recommended. Prices generally fall in the $$$$ range and, as with all our venues, hours and availability can vary. 

Let me help you with those arrangements; I can provide all the information you need and then connect you with our host team to finalize your table. Are you planning a celebratory dinner or are you just looking for a perfectly aged ribeye this evening?

Dr. Seven, reservations are highly recommended at Michael Jordan's Steak House to ensure you have a table waiting for you. 

They open this evening at 5:00 PM, and since it is one of our most popular fine-dining destinations for USDA Prime steaks, it is best to secure your spot early to enjoy the elegant atmosphere. I can provide any specific details you need about their signature dishes or the wine list, and then I will be happy to connect you with our host team to finalize your booking. 

After a rich dinner like that, many of our guests enjoy a stroll over to the Wolf Den for some live music—would you like me to see who is performing tonight?
I hear you — let me connect you directly with our host team so they can take care of this for you.
